title: Of the Coming of John
venue: A. C. McClurg and Co., Chicago

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Of the Coming of John (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Souls of Black Folk.
excerpt: What bring they ’neath the midnight, Beside the River-sea? They bring the human heart wherein No nightly calm can be; That droppeth never with the wind, Nor drieth with the dew; O calm it, God; thy calm is broad To cover spirits too. The river...
